Added_Other.purpose: Improves communication between game systems, enhancing overall performance.

Added_Other.name: FFlagTelemetryUsePreFlagMutexForReliabilityCounters
Added_Other.mechanism: Uses a mutex to manage access to reliability counters for telemetry data.
Added_Other.purpose: Increases the reliability of data collection, ensuring players receive accurate performance metrics.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Links to a dynamic string that represents the current version of the code.
Changed_Other.purpose: Helps ensure players receive the latest updates and fixes.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Updates how dynamic strings with timestamps are processed in the game.
Changed_Other.purpose: Ensures that time-sensitive information is displayed correctly for players.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Utilizes a fast string representation of the Git hash for version control.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves loading times and version tracking for developers.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlipTimeStampFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Optimizes the way timestamps are processed in strings.
Changed_Other.purpose: Enhances performance when displaying or manipulating time-related data.
